title: Fate's Digimon TCG
description: A TCG Sidemod for Digimod that introduces cards that buff tamed digimon.
body:
A Digimon TCG sidemod for the Digimod mod made by ModderG. This mod adds collectable Digimon cards for mapmakers and digimod servers to use as rewards for players to trade and collect. Summon cards are a stable of the mod as well, allowing players to summon strong variants of Digimon that drop valuable loot.

This mod is constantly evolving and changing as it gets updated and I learn more and more about how to mod. Planned Features include buffs to your Digimon depending on what cards you have, compatibility with vanilla loot chests, and support for Digimod servers.
